notes: Built-in user-testing-validator workers were unstable in this mission, so flutter-thread-detail-parity assertions were synthesized manually from the committed real-thread-backed widget/integration evidence, live bridge checks, and emulator-backed integration runs recorded in the feature handoffs.
VAL-FLUTTER-001/002 were proven by the direct detail-endpoint hydration change plus real target-thread fixtures `real_thread_019d_detail.json` and `real_thread_019d_timeline_limit_80.json`.

VAL-FLUTTER-003/004/005 were proven by real-thread fixture-backed widget coverage, including the captured search-annotation page `real_thread_019d_timeline_before_478_limit_80.json` with `Search (4)` grouping evidence.

VAL-FLUTTER-006 and VAL-CROSS-003 were proven by pagination/list-sync widget coverage using the paired real older-history fixture plus the live emulator parity test that kept list/detail fields aligned after refresh.

VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-002 were proven by emulator-backed integration runs on `emulator-5554` plus live `/threads`, `/timeline`, and `/policy/access-mode` checks recorded in the integration feature handoffs.
